title: The Observer
description: An origin for the origins mod
body:
An origin made by the Lorax




đź”µEvanescet - You are able to dissappear into another realm
đź”µDimensio Viatorem - You are able to tp to the nether and end
đź”µManifestatio - You can channel your power to enter the real world
đź”µVenox Evanescet - You peak into your own realm while crouching

đź”´Fragilis Manifestatio - When you manifest and enter the real world you enter a weakened state where you are esentially powerless

- Immunity to glowing effect
- -3 attack dmg
- 2 hearts
- shaking
